description: Test cases verifying answers actually address the question asked

contexts: Return Policy: Items may be returned within 30 days for a full refund. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Shipping costs are non-refundable.
cases.description: Return policy question - answer must mention time window and refund
cases.rationale: A return policy answer should specify the return window and refund details

cases.query: How do I reset my password?
contexts: Password Reset: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email, and follow the link sent to your inbox. Your new password must be at least 8 characters.
cases.description: Password reset how-to - must include actionable steps
cases.rationale: How-to answers must include the actual steps to perform the action

cases.query: What is the price of the Enterprise plan?
contexts: Pricing: Basic $9/month, Pro $29/month, Enterprise custom pricing. Contact sales for Enterprise quotes. All plans include 14-day free trial.
cases.description: Price question for Enterprise - must indicate custom/contact sales
cases.rationale: Enterprise pricing requires contacting sales; answer must convey this

contexts: System Requirements: Windows 10 or macOS 12+, 8GB RAM minimum, 500MB disk space, stable internet connection required.
cases.description: System requirements - must include OS and memory requirements
cases.rationale: System requirements answers must specify minimum hardware/software

cases.query: Who do I contact for support?
contexts: Support: Email support@example.com for general inquiries. Premium users can access live chat 24/7. Phone support available at 1-800-555-0123.
cases.description: Support contact - must include contact method
cases.rationale: Contact questions must provide actual contact information

contexts: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal. Wire transfers available for annual Enterprise plans.
cases.description: Payment methods - must list accepted methods
cases.rationale: Payment questions require listing the actual payment options
